patient_summary: Olivia, female, age 73 (patient ID 104). Multiple encounters documented across Singing River and Piedmont systems between 2021–2025, including a scheduled colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025. Active diagnoses documented include mixed dyslipidemia (primary), essential hypertension, leg pain, postoperative and unspecified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Key recent laboratories (07/03/2023, Singing River) show triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), VLDL 32 mg/dL (H), ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), low iron 41 ug/dL, low iron saturation 15% and eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L). Blood pressure recorded 128/78 on 01/11/2025. Multiple care team members are documented including Hand HA MD (PCP) and multiple Piedmont specialists. Notable conflicts in the record include differing DOB entries and inconsistent sex/legal sex and smoking history across sources; these are preserved for reconciliation.
